mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_quote_snapshot (canonical_symbol,quote_time,current_price,open_price,high_price,low_price,pre_close_price,volume,amount,trade_status,data_source,fetched_at,raw_hash) VALUES (#{canonicalSymbol},#{quoteTime},#{currentPrice},#{openPrice},#{highPrice},#{lowPrice},#{preClosePrice},#{volume},#{amount},#{tradeStatus},#{dataSource},#{fetchedAt},#{rawHash}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_price=VALUES(current_price),open_price=VALUES(open_price),high_price=VALUES(high_price),low_price=VALUES(low_price),pre_close_price=VALUES(pre_close_price),volume=VALUES(volume),amount=VALUES(amount),trade_status=VALUES(trade_status),fetched_at=VALUES(fetched_at),raw_hash=VALUES(raw_hash)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM stock_quote_snapshot WHERE canonical_symbol=#{canonicalSymbol} AND data_source=#{dataSource} AND quote_time=#{quoteTime}
SELECT FROM stock_quote_snapshotAND canonical_symbol=#{canonicalSymbol}AND data_source=#{dataSource}ORDER BY quote_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM stock_quote_snapshotAND canonical_symbol=#{canonicalSymbol}AND data_source=#{dataSource}
